points.text: Oxford BioTherapeutics advanced obrixtamig (OBT620), a DLL3-targeting bispecific T-cell engager, to global Phase 3 development for extensive-stage small cell lung cancer and extrapulmonary neuroendocrine carcinoma.
Oxford BioTherapeutics initiated first-patient dosing for BI 3820768, a second Boehringer Ingelheim-partnered program from its multi-target collaboration, triggering a milestone payment.
Lonza and InduPro announced a licensing agreement to combine InduPro's bispecific antibody capabilities with Lonza's ADC platform technologies including GlycoConnect and HydraSpace.
InduPro will utilize the Lonza partnership to develop proximity-driven bispecific antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) targeting up to two oncology antigens.
Prolium Bioscience dosed the first patient in a multinational Phase 1/2 study of PRO-203, a CD20xCD3 T-cell engager (bispecific format), for systemic sclerosis.
Prolium Bioscience completed the last patient, last visit in a 26-week investigator-led study of PRO-203, a CD20xCD3 bispecific T-cell engager, in treatment-refractory lupus nephritis.
China Medical System (CMS) received approval in China for Silevimig injection, the world's first bispecific antibody indicated for passive immunization against rabies.
Antengene licensed ATG-106, a preclinical CDH6×CD3 bispecific T-cell engager for solid tumors, to K2 Therapeutics in a deal valued at ~$1.96B including milestones and royalties.
Antengene granted K2 Therapeutics an option for exclusive rights to a second undisclosed bispecific T-cell engager candidate covering all global markets except Greater China.
Novel bispecific antibodies and engineered cellular therapy platforms generated significant data at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting and 2026 EHA Congress for aggressive and indolent B-cell lymphomas.

Oxford BioTherapeutics — Obrixtamig (OBT620) — DLL3-positive extensive-stage small cell lung cancer and extrapulmonary neuroendocrine carcinoma — Advancement to global Phase 3; DAREON®-Lung-1 trial (combo with chemo/atezolizumab) and DAREON-NEC-1 trial (combo with chemo) initiated with first patients dosed.
Oxford BioTherapeutics — BI 3820768 — Advanced solid tumours — First-patient dosing achieved; triggered milestone payment to OBT as the third Boehringer Ingelheim-partnered program to enter clinic.

Lonza / InduPro — Next-generation bispecific ADCs — Oncology (up to two antigens) — Signed licensing agreement granting InduPro non-exclusive worldwide rights to Lonza's GlycoConnect, HydraSpace, and linker-payload technologies.
Prolium Bioscience — PRO-203 — Systemic Sclerosis — First patient dosed in multinational, open-label Phase 1/2 study; program is a CD20xCD3 T-cell engager (bispecific) administered subcutaneously.
Prolium Bioscience — PRO-203 — Refractory Lupus Nephritis — Last patient, last visit completed in 26-week investigator-led study; PRO-203 is a CD20xCD3 bispecific T-cell engager.
China Medical System — Silevimig — Rabies passive immunization — Approved as Class 1 innovative drug in China; identified as the world's first bispecific antibody for this indication.
Antengene — ATG-106 — Solid Tumors — Licensed CDH6×CD3 bispecific T-cell engager to K2 Therapeutics; deal includes $20M upfront, ~$960.5M in milestones, and tiered royalties.

Antengene — Undisclosed bispecific TCE — Solid Tumors — Granted K2 Therapeutics option for exclusive global rights (excl. Greater China) with ~$20M option exercise fee and ~$960.5M in potential milestones.

Epcoritamab-bysp — Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma (DLBCL) — Phase 2 study (NCT06045247) evaluating epcoritamab-bysp plus R-miniCVP in elderly and frail patients with newly diagnosed DLBCL presented at ASCO 2026.
Surovatamig (AZD0486) — Follicular Lymphoma — Phase 3 SOUNDTRACK-F1 trial (NCT06549595) initial safety run-in data for previously untreated patients presented at EHA 2026.

Oxford BioTherapeutics — Proteomics-driven target discovery for bispecific T-cell engagers — Obrixtamig (DLL3-targeting) + BI 3820768 + BI 765049 — Three clinical programs active; collaboration with Boehringer Ingelheim expanded in 2020 and 2023.

InduPro — Proximity-guided bispecific ADC development — Pipeline of bispecific antibody-drug conjugates — Secured Lonza licensing for GlycoConnect/HydraSpace to advance first-in-class therapeutics for hard-to-treat tumors.

Prolium Bioscience — Advancing bispecific T-cell engager pipeline — PRO-203 (CD20xCD3) — Phase 1/2 in systemic sclerosis initiated; Phase 1 SAD study in healthy volunteers completed; investigator-led lupus nephritis study completed.
China Medical System — Commercializing first-in-class rabies bispecific — Silevimig — Regulatory approval secured in China for passive immunization; distinct from its siRNA pipeline program CMS-D008.

Antengene — Bispecific T-cell engager commercialization — ATG-106 + undisclosed bispecific TCE — Secured ~$1.96B deal with K2 Therapeutics; ATG-106 is preclinical CDH6×CD3 bispecific for solid tumors.

K2 Therapeutics — Acquisition of bispecific T-cell engager assets — ATG-106 + option on second bispecific — Paid $20M upfront plus equity stake; holds global rights (excl. Greater China) for development and commercialization.
AbbVie / Genmab — Bispecific antibody strategy — Epcoritamab-bysp (Epkinly) — Advancing chemotherapy-free frontline treatment in follicular lymphoma and DLBCL via Phase 2 and Phase 3 programs.
AstraZeneca — Bispecific antibody development — Surovatamig (AZD0486) — Phase 3 SOUNDTRACK-F1 trial ongoing for previously untreated follicular lymphoma.

Obrixtamig (OBT620) — Mechanism: DLL3-targeting bispecific T-cell engager — Phase: 3 — Population: Previously untreated extensive-stage small cell lung cancer and DLL3-positive extrapulmonary neuroendocrine carcinoma — Comparator: Chemotherapy ± atezolizumab — Status: First patients dosed in DAREON®-Lung-1 and DAREON-NEC-1 trials.

InduPro bispecific ADCs — Mechanism: Proximity-guided bispecific antibody-drug conjugates targeting up to two oncology antigens — Phase: Preclinical/Early development — Population: Hard-to-treat tumors — Technology: Integration of InduPro's co-target pair identification with Lonza's GlycoConnect and HydraSpace platforms.

PRO-203 — Mechanism: CD20xCD3 T-cell engager (bispecific) forming immunological synapse to redirect T-cells to CD20+ B-cells via TDCC — Phase: 1/2 — Population: Systemic sclerosis and refractory lupus nephritis — Comparator: None stated (open-label) — Status: First patient dosed in SSc; LPLV in LN study.
Silevimig — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody for passive immunization — Phase: Approved (Class 1) — Population: Rabies exposure prophylaxis — Status: First-in-class approval in China.

ATG-106 — Mechanism: CDH6×CD3 bispecific T-cell engager — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Solid tumors — Target: CDH6 antigen on tumor cells and CD3 on T-cells — Status: Licensed for global development.

Epcoritamab-bysp — Mechanism: CD3xCD20 bispecific antibody — Phase: 2 — Population: Elderly and frail patients with newly diagnosed DLBCL — Regimen: Epcoritamab-bysp + R-miniCVP — Context: Presented at ASCO 2026.
Surovatamig (AZD0486) — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody — Phase: 3 — Population: Previously untreated follicular lymphoma — Context: Initial safety run-in data presented at EHA 2026.

Oxford BioTherapeutics — Boehringer Ingelheim collaboration — BI 3820768 program — Triggered milestone payment upon first-patient dosing; partnership includes three clinical programs and one optioned target as of January 2025.

Lonza / InduPro — Licensing agreement — Bispecific ADC technologies — InduPro granted non-exclusive worldwide license to Lonza's GlycoConnect, HydraSpace, and linker-payload technologies to advance bispecific ADC pipeline.
Antengene / K2 Therapeutics — ~$1.96B licensing deal — ATG-106 (CDH6×CD3 bispecific) + option on second bispecific — $20M upfront + minority equity stake + ~$960.5M in milestones + tiered royalties.
